info.title: SecPaid Interative API
info.description: The SecPaid  API allows developers to create secure payment links (Link To Pay), manage payment transactions, and process payments seamlessly. Utilize this API to integrate payment functionalities into your applications, enabling users to handle payments efficiently.

post.summary: Create a new payment link (Link To Pay)
post.description: Generates a new payment link (Link To Pay) using the provided recipient note and amount. This link can be shared with customers for payment processing.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Access token which gets swapped for Bearer token during authentication

requestBody.description: Details required to create a new payment link

recipient_note.description: A note or message for the recipient to accompany the payment link. (Max. 50 characeters)

callback_url.description: No of Callback Base URl to redirect to (Set in settings)

amount.description: The amount to be paid by the recipient

successfulCreation.summary: Example response for a successful creation

400.description: Bad Request due to invalid input parameters

invalidParameters.summary: Example response for invalid input (no amount set)

401.description: Unauthorized access due to invalid API key or token (demo only)

value.errorMessage: No user found with the provided API key.

403.description: Forbidden access due to insufficient permissions

value.errorMessage: You do not have permission to perform this action.

500.description: Internal Server Error due to an unexpected condition

internalServerError.summary: Example response for internal server error

value.errorMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Create a new split payment link
post.description:
Generates a new split payment link using the provided recipients, amount, recipient note, and callback URL.
This link can be shared with customers for split payment processing.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Access token which gets swapped for Bearer token during authentication.

requestBody.description: Details required to create a new split payment link.

recipients.description: List of recipient objects with their tokens and share percentages.

share.description: Percentage share allocated to this recipient.

recipient_note.description: A note or message for the recipient to accompany the payment link. (Max. 50 characeters)

callback_url.description: No of Callback Base URl to redirect to (Set in settings)

amount.description: The amount to be paid by the recipient

data.description: Data pertaining to the newly created split payment link.

400.description: Bad Request due to invalid input parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized access due to invalid API key or token.

403.description: Forbidden access due to insufficient permissions.

500.description: Internal Server Error due to an unexpected condition.

post.description: Fetches a  list of incoming payment transactions (pay-ins) for the authenticated user. Useful for monitoring received payments, notification and creation of downstream events

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Access token (demo only) in Bearer format for authentication

limit.description: The number of items to retrieve per page

since.description: A starting point or offset for transactions

pay_id.description: Payment ID to filter the transactions

search.description: A keyword to filter transactions by details or amount

total.description: Total number of pay-in transactions available

post.description: Fetches a paginated list of outgoing payment transactions (pay-outs) for the authenticated user. Useful for tracking funds withdrawn or transferred.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Access token (demo only) in Bearer format for authentication

search.description: A keyword to filter transactions by details or amount

limit.description: The number of items to retrieve per page

total.description: Total number of pay-out transactions available

post.description: Fetches a paginated list of unused payment links that were created by the authenticated user. Useful for managing and tracking pending payment requests.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Access token (demo only) in Bearer format for authentication

search.description: A keyword to filter links by recipient note or amount

limit.description: The number of items to retrieve per page

200.description: A list of unused payment links

data.description: An array of unused payment links

total.description: Total number of unused links available

unusedLinks.summary: Example response with unused payment links

post.description: Fetches a paginated list of used (redeemed) payment links that were created by the authenticated user. Useful for tracking completed payments.

search.description: A keyword to filter links by recipient note or amount

limit.description: The number of items to retrieve per page

200.description: A list of used payment links

data.description: An array of used payment links

total.description: Total number of used links available

usedLinks.summary: Example response with used payment links

post.summary: (to be released) Delete a payment link
post.description: Deletes an existing payment link specified by the link ID. This action is irreversible and the link will no longer be usable.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Access token in Bearer format for authentication

requestBody.description: Link ID required to delete the payment link

link_id.description: The unique identifier of the link to be deleted

post.description: Initiates a refund for a specific payment transaction identified by pay_id.

pay_id.description: Unique identifier of the payment to refund

post.description: Generates a PDF document for a specific transaction
Generates a tax invoice document for accounting purposes

month_and_year.description: Month and year for the tax invoice

post.description: Generates a CSV file of the Payout transaction details

Link.description: Details of a payment link (Link To Pay)

id.description: Unique identifier for the payment link

user_id.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the link

amount.description: The amount specified for the payment link

recipient_note.description: Note or message for the recipient

status.description: The current status of the payment link (e.g., 'Unused', 'Used')

paymentEndpoint.description: URL endpoint where the payment can be processed

servicefee.description: Service fee for the payment link

recipients.description: Recipients associated with the payment link

is_split_link.description: Indicates if the payment link is part of a split link

bank_transfer.description: Indicates if bank transfer is enabled for the payment link

is_qr_link.description: Indicates if the payment link has a QR code

created_at.description: Timestamp when the link was created

pay_link.description: Direct URL to the payment page

qr_img.description: URL to the QR code image for the payment link

user_id.description: Unique identifier of the user associated with the payment

net_amount.description: Net amount received after deducting fees

service_fee.description: Service fee charged for the payment

service_fee_psp.description: Service fee charged by the payment service provider (PSP)

status.description: Status of the payment (e.g., Success, Failed)

recipient_note.description: Note or message for the recipient

payout_status.description: Status of the payout associated with the payment

created_at.description: Timestamp when the payment was created

is_split_link.description: Indicates if the payment is part of a split link

is_dispute.description: Indicates if the payment is under dispute

is_refund.description: Indicates if the payment has been refunded

payment_method.description: Method used for the payment (e.g., card, bank transfer)

user_id.description: Unique identifier of the user associated with the payout

transaction_id.description: Unique identifier of the associated transaction

service_fee.description: Service fee charged for the payout

net_amount.description: Net amount received after deducting fees

payout_status.description: Status of the payout (e.g., Approved, Pending)

request_date.description: Date when the payout was requested

created_at.description: Timestamp when the payout was created

is_split_link.description: Indicates if the payout is part of a split link

is_dispute.description: Indicates if the payout is under dispute

is_refund.description: Indicates if the payout has been refunded

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response for the API

BadRequest.description: Bad Request due to invalid input parameters

Unauthorized.description: Authentication credentials were missing or incorrect.

value.errorMessage: No user found with the provided API key.

Forbidden.description: Forbidden access due to insufficient permissions

value.errorMessage: No user found with the provided API key.
The requested resource could not be found.

InternalServerError.description: Internal Server Error due to an unexpected condition

value.errorMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
